display_text: Does your integrated AI system function as a safety component of the product, AND does that product fall within one of the Annex I Section A regulated categories?
hint_text: Article 25(3) and Article 6(1) together make a product manufacturer's embedded AI high-risk if it is a safety component of an Annex I Section A product (machinery, medical devices, toys, etc.). A 'safety component' is any part whose failure could endanger persons or property (Article 3(14)). No separate third-party assessment check is needed here — falling into Annex I Section A via this route directly triggers high-risk classification and full provider obligations (Article 16).

options.label: Yes — the AI functions as a safety component of a product in an Annex I Section A category (e.g., machinery, medical device, toy)
keywords: Annex I Section A product AI
embedded AI product manufacturer high risk

options.label: No — the AI is not a safety component of any Annex I Section A product, or the product does not fall in any listed category
